textByHash.ff2677f4211c1eac1568d0a848008be8988c6340: Well hello there. Are you hungry? If so you've come to the right place. Eat green, eat gnome cuisine. My waiter will be glad to take your order.
textByHash.53b5c0e3812fbddb47c831e8670d5f2d638c3047: On the other hand, if you're looking for some gnome cooking training, this is also the place to be. My son Lufty is looking for staff at the moment.
textByHash.88eaa60f739659ce76c1e16d4c9926991b23c400: In that case, please eat and enjoy.
textByHash.0b26e52294913422517af3890389e10bf716ef2b: Well that's great. I'm Aluft Gianne, owner of this restaurant, and you are...?
textByHash.2841b1bf7b28b2011a6ad8297377f7957fdbd2b3: Really? Sorry, how rude of me. It just takes a little while to get used to the funny names you humans have.
textByHash.b36b4a0b711361d5a9f1751d4f6d844571e7636a: Of course if you're going to work for me I'll have to see what you're like first. Here, take a look at our menu.
textByHash.aef77b7c95d447dcea28eb077528367e1ea8d6a2: When you've had a look at the book, come back here and I'll let you prepare a few dishes.
textByHash.a34615e1764888211e4b203b2d0af939707c8aad: Hello . So what did you think of the book?
textByHash.12385c983d1f53c3e66f7284ec96826ae3c62080: They're a gnome delicacy, very tasty. Chicken tastes like toad's legs you know. You'll love them. If I give you what you need, can you make me some Toad Crunchies?
textByHash.b2cbfc3a8d509e332a97f9c5e74f4acc13a62ce3: The dough is made according to a secret family recipe. If you need any more, I suggest you speak to Hudo the grocer. He's very reliable.
textByHash.e7d51306ca7e9c6a54b84b669179d876afe2ab4f: Let me know how you get on.
textByHash.177c14a2fc496f11b51786f67c6f227a390c9d24: So how did you get on with the toad crunchies?
textByHash.a5dbc0dbd19b17ddaf6a3d8c3518ba39d9fa597a: That looks identical to the crunchies I cooked not five minutes ago. You'll have to prove to me that you can make one yourself if you want my recommendation.
textByHash.fca3e4f763b488c779ad7969ecd7e7b1880e5dea: Ok, let me know when you have.
textByHash.89ea74e5807d8402a87bbf77e260ff90ba439e31: Ok, I'll give you another one. Obviously I can't expect you to cook without the proper utensils.
textByHash.b6427e8792dfe93dbe07c465229109b087672b18: Ok, well let me know when you're done.
textByHash.6bf96294a1679a1f3f4b9c00a1fa3801e5977737: Call me Aluft. So how did you get on with the toad crunchies?
textByHash.4c987481be7204d11813beadf1395d60cf673139: Not bad, not bad at all.
textByHash.fc2f4581ee95ceff3bb247da2963347dc00848d0: Ok, now for something you might prefer. Try making some chocolate chip crunchies for me. They're my favourite. Here's everything you need. You can re-use the spice from the last recipe - one tin goes a long way.
textByHash.bc1582b08997d5ac2bffee1be31198fd0f542175: Hello there, how did you get on.
textByHash.e0ebaaf984f1cdc1531fab83fa39856d88a14925: It's one trayful of chocolate chip crunchies that I need. Just follow the instructions carefully.
textByHash.3e17d4c823f5b73109a538f1361adec0995c4d4d: Yes, yes, yes, that's superb. I'm really impressed.
textByHash.0fdda266f5f13d7c8390a1fabf0645a4ca3776b1: Ok then, can you make me a toad batta? Here's what you need.
textByHash.47fbd93bffa6ebf4d1c3e57bc32a070ec0f56e75: Let me know when the batta is ready.
textByHash.dade875b3f17ed5df05c529cd44c9fa7acc50192: That looks identical to the toad batta I cooked not five minutes ago. You'll have to prove to me that you can make one yourself if you want my recommendation.
textByHash.470f80f3f9c5c2d0181b5dbcf7c93d25f0835184: Ok, be as quick as you can.
textByHash.d6071a4bd0e62fbd8f573b1289d7eb311b268767: Ooh, that's some good toad. Very nice.
textByHash.412d9f11233cb1c94bb734e5a96f1d27bcc08750: Let's see if you can make a cheese and tomato batta next.
textByHash.2dfe337699bc836e486c30a069c11bcef4846078: Hello have you made my Cheese and tomato Batta?
textByHash.0c6a11901b10a0afa9b3795d5da0515c9732ef9b: That looks identical to the cheese and tomato batta I cooked not five minutes ago. You'll have to prove to me that you can make one yourself if you want my recommendation.
textByHash.65bba49a5c4272af09980be8a9c4081c3a9ec238: How about this? Hmmm. I think you may well be ready for real cooking. Well I'm happy to give you my recommendation to Jnr, if that's what you want.
textByHash.929b08ccf09633b1ad8c015f890743acd7053d88: Well your training with me is over . Are you interested in some work?
textByHash.3c4c8cf52145a901ec6c68385ba6365fb91b07b0: I think you're almost ready to do some work for my son Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of our new family venture: Gnome Food Delivery. There's good tips to be made if you make and deliver gnome foods -
textByHash.55cc38d30e2bd03a193d952e87f522c7e49b8399: though you may have to travel all over Gielinor to fulfil some of the other orders...
textByHash.970ee4a2285453157e6b1fd2a11022daf573f74b: However, some of the orders Aluft aloft gets are for gnome cocktails, so if you want to work for Lufty, you'll need to undergo some basic cocktail making training. Go and have a chat with him. He's not that
textByHash.5d4026f2530a0af4a336cbf4d59bf77b66ef8f6c: Oh, one last thing. My special dough, can be occasionally tricky to get hold of. I wouldn't want to stop you from cooking gnome delicacies for want of dough!
textByHash.c7b2389b5b138cdeb456e4acf76a51c2d23d16db: That should last you for a small while eh? That's all the free dough I'm going to give you so don't waste it!
textByHash.0473cae51d58f6f4f462b82be83d17c26d255c7e: Blurberry tells me that you have finished training with him, so I think you're ready to do some work for my son Aluft Gianne Jnr. He is in charge of our new family venture: Gnome Food Delivery. There's good
textByHash.d8b0e76c3b793b9d7415b3c6bf031eab22f94b5f: tips to be made if you make and deliver gnome foods - though you may have to travel all over Gielinor to fulfil some of the other orders...
textByHash.c11ce15502000517a3029375382ad93c59fa7789: Go and have a chat with my son Lufty Jnr. and he'll fill you in with details.
